title: kohautia caespitosa subsp. brachyloba
intro: Kohautia caespitosa subsp. brachyloba is a sub-species of the Kohautia caespitosa plant, a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, Kohautia caespitosa subsp. brachyloba has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Kohautia caespitosa subsp. brachyloba is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves are also used in herbal remedies in various forms.
